category_title: Students who seek business ownership and professional autonomy after previous unsuccessful placements
scenario_title: Customer service interactions and professional self-regulation
minimal_context: Anne is handling cash and scheduling a client's tanning sessions at the tanning salon.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Anne, please handle the cash and schedule this client's tanning sessions for the week.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Okay. I'm trying to get it done, but they keep changing their mind. I want to be treated like an adult instead of just like some kid, but they aren't listening to my scheduling options.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep working on the schedule.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know I need to show up and do my work. I'm trying to be more grown up about it, but this is taking a really long time.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should say to them?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I didn't know that I was so impatient. I know I have to be the bigger person, but I'm really struggling not to be rude to this customer right now.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Anne, please handle the cash and schedule this client's tanning sessions for the week.

STUDENT: Okay. I'm trying to get it done, but they keep changing their mind. I want to be treated like an adult instead of just like some kid, but they aren't listening to my scheduling options.

TUTOR: Just keep working on the schedule.

STUDENT: I know I need to show up and do my work. I'm trying to be more grown up about it, but this is taking a really long time.

TUTOR: What do you think you should say to them?

STUDENT: I didn't know that I was so impatient. I know I have to be the bigger person, but I'm really struggling not to be rude to this customer right now.

task.content: Handling cash, scheduling clients’ tanning sessions, cleaning, and learning about managing a business

context.social_setting: Interacting with adult co-workers and customers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When dealing with customers at the tanning salon
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Acting impatient and having to suppress the urge to be rude to a customer
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: I didn’t know that I was so impatient
related_quotes: You just definitely learn so much about yourself. Like I didn’t know that I was so impatient.… I learned I can’t be rude to a customer. Like, you just have to be more grown up … You have to be the bigger person.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Struggling with impatience and needing to consciously act more grown up and be the bigger person
related_quotes: Like I didn’t know that I was so impatient.… I learned I can’t be rude to a customer.
